title: zanthoxylum clava-herculis subsp. fruticosum
intro: Zanthoxylum clava-herculis subsp. fruticosum, also known as Hercules club or spiny hop tree, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as its potential to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
